mapper.select: SELECT r.id as id, r.product_id as productId, r.user_id as userId, r.order_id as orderId, r.rating as rating, r.title as title, r.body as body, r.verified_purchase as verifiedPurchase, r.helpful_count as helpfulCount, r.unhelpful_count as unhelpfulCount, r.state_id as stateId, r.created_at as createdAt FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id as id, r.product_id as productId, r.user_id as userId, r.rating as rating, r.title as title, r.body as body, r.verified_purchase as verifiedPurchase, r.helpful_count as helpfulCount, r.state_id as stateId, r.created_at as createdAt FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
